title: Gung Slabs
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Gung Slabs''' were a series of monoliths found on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They were essential to the translation of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] language of [[Old Gungan/Legends|Old Gungan]], as one side of the slabs was engraved with Old Gungan and the reverse inscribed with [[Olys Corellisi/Legends|Olys Corellisi]].

These relics, coupled with the work of philologist [[Burro Flats]] of the [[Baobab Archives]], helped [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to better understand the culture and language of the Gungan people.

==Behind the scenes==
The Gung Slabs' story and importance show considerable resemblance to the [[Wikipedia:Rosetta Stone|Rosetta Stone]].

==Sources==
